g.onclick: sendPrompt('In a RAG system, what document types can be ingested and how does LangChain handle loaders?')
sendPrompt('What are the best chunking strategies in RAG? Explain semantic chunking vs recursive vs parent-child splitting with LangChain examples.')
sendPrompt('How do dense embedding models work in RAG? Compare OpenAI embeddings vs open-source models like BGE and sentence-transformers.')
sendPrompt('What vector databases are best for RAG? Compare FAISS, Chroma, Pinecone, and Weaviate. Also explain why BM25 is stored alongside vector index.')
sendPrompt('Walk me through the full query pipeline in RAG — from user input to retrieval. What happens step by step?')
sendPrompt('Explain HyDE (Hypothetical Document Embeddings) and multi-query retrieval in LangChain with code examples.')
sendPrompt('How does hybrid search work in RAG? Show me how to combine BM25 keyword search with semantic vector search using LangChain and EnsembleRetriever.')
sendPrompt('What is cross-encoder reranking in RAG and why does it improve retrieval accuracy? Show a LangChain implementation with Cohere or a local cross-encoder.')
sendPrompt('What is contextual compression in RAG? Explain MMR and LLM-based filtering with LangChain ContextualCompressionRetriever code.')
sendPrompt('How does the LLM generation step work in RAG? Explain prompt construction with retrieved context, system prompts, and how to avoid hallucination.')
sendPrompt('How do you generate source citations in RAG responses? Show me how to extract and format document sources in LangChain with RetrievalQAWithSourcesChain.')
sendPrompt('How does RAGAS evaluate a RAG pipeline? Explain each metric — faithfulness, answer relevancy, context precision, and context recall — with code examples.')
g.text: Faithfulness · Answer relevancy · Context precision · Context recall
